compiled_state.title: Create shared exploration decomposition protocol at exploration-decomposition.md
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) after all tasks complete
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Protocol file exists at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
- [ ] Protocol contains SINGLE_SOURCE vs MULTI_SOURCE classification rules
  Verify: grep -q "SINGLE_SOURCE" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md && grep -q "MULTI_SOURCE" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
- [ ] Classification rule: only scope to codebase when a specific artifact is named; pronouns (we/our/us) do not imply this project
  Verify: grep -q "artifact\|pronoun\|we.*our.*us" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
- [ ] Classification rule: web is not a single source — broad web questions decompose by knowledge facet
  Verify: grep -q "facet\|not a single source\|NOT a single source" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
- [ ] Classification rule: codebase searches spanning multiple architectural layers are MULTI_SOURCE
  Verify: grep -q "architectural layer\|multiple.*layer" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
- [ ] Classification rule: ambiguity drives decomposition
  Verify: grep -q "ambiguity\|ambiguous" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
- [ ] Classification rule: preserve acronyms and unfamiliar terms without rephrasing
  Verify: grep -q "acronym\|rephrase\|unfamiliar" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
- [ ] DECOMPOSE_RECOMMENDED escape hatch with bright-line trigger: correct answer depends on a factor not specified in the question, or two findings directly contradict
  Verify: grep -q "DECOMPOSE_RECOMMENDED" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md && grep -q "factor\|contradict" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
- [ ] Re-decomposition bounded to 1 level
  Verify: grep -q "1.*level\|one.*re-decomposition\|bounded.*1" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md
- [ ] Structured finding format specified for aggregation (FINDING and DECOMPOSE_RECOMMENDED response types)
  Verify: grep -q "FINDING" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md

## TDD Requirement
RED tests from task f5a5-dfa5 must pass (GREEN) for the protocol file existence and content assertions after this task completes.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/exploration-decomposition.md (create)
